creator: baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com
text:
Here is an update to 1.8

--- feh.patch begins here ---
diff -Nrau feh.orig/Makefile feh/Makefile
--- feh.orig/Makefile   2010-05-21 17:24:45.000000000 +0200
+++ feh/Makefile        2010-06-28 08:45:03.828096788 +0200
@@ -6,9 +6,10 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      feh
-PORTVERSION=   1.5
+PORTVERSION=   1.8
 CATEGORIES=    graphics
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.chaosdorf.de/~derf/feh/ \
+               https://derf.homelinux.org/projects/feh/ \
                http://people.freebsd.org/~uqs/distfiles/

 MAINTAINER=    uqs@FreeBSD.org
diff -Nrau feh.orig/distinfo feh/distinfo
--- feh.orig/distinfo   2010-05-21 17:24:45.000000000 +0200
+++ feh/distinfo        2010-06-28 08:45:30.996018466 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (feh-1.5.tar.bz2) = aee156f0a82582108c5a56fbe85319ae
-SHA256 (feh-1.5.tar.bz2) =
f6833936b3f78b7a34bdd1beb75018daefe449a576d93b3e4eb98f8d43f51a66
-SIZE (feh-1.5.tar.bz2) = 258129
+MD5 (feh-1.8.tar.bz2) = fe81334805f4da9b5f1e35b45c444a1a
+SHA256 (feh-1.8.tar.bz2) =
9ee3f0d9d1b9704ae0131a3b51c8220e701ebe3d0457ae21122733fae915b0ac
+SIZE (feh-1.8.tar.bz2) = 358172
--- feh.patch ends here ---
